descFull: LuaN1aoAgent is a cognitive-driven, fully autonomous AI penetration testing agent powered by dual-graph reasoning. It is developed by the Intelligent Offensive and Defensive Security Team led by Professor Lu Hui, Dean of the Institute of Cyberspace Security at Guangzhou University.
